status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 4 / COMBINATION ANALYTICS BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Fixed-ratio supplier triple-agonist and amylin-analogue combination
mechanism_summary: Theoretical multi-receptor activity is not evidence of safe or effective combined human use.
evidence_maturity: No direct combination-specific primary evidence has been closed into CertiAura.
regulatory_headline: UNAPPROVED SUPPLIER METABOLIC COMBINATION / PRODUCT-SPECIFIC HUMAN EVIDENCE NOT CLOSED

catalogue_supplier_skus.specification: Retatrutide 5 mg + Cagrilintide 5 mg; 10 mg x 10 vials

closure_state: BLOCKED — EXACT COMPONENT FORMS, FIXED RATIO, CO-FORMULATION, DIRECT HUMAN COMBINATION EVIDENCE AND REGULATORY STATUS UNVERIFIED
authoritative_product_boundary: Retatrutide and cagrilintide have separate sponsor-controlled clinical-development programmes. An exact ClinicalTrials.gov search did not identify a registered retatrutide-plus-cagrilintide study for RC10 as of the review date. Separate monotherapy or comparator trials do not establish the supplier blend.
critical_closure_controls: No direct RC10 human-combination evidence is closed
Retatrutide and cagrilintide monotherapy evidence cannot be combined
Broad GLP-1, GIP, glucagon, amylin and calcitonin-family exposure remains experimental
No dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
